projects.name: Brigadier
projects.headline: Bypass Roblox's abusive filter through both text and voice chat. Over 5,500 premium users!
projects.description:
Brigadier Relay is coming in March! Read below for more info.

Brigadier is a modding tool which allows you to bypass the Roblox filter in a large variety of ways. Enjoy a wholesome world of swearing and slurs whenever you use Brigadier. Brigadier is available in every single form of Roblox communication: in-game text chat, DM's and group chats, personal messages, and even voice chat (coming February, for a small extra fee).

Worried about privacy? No worries, only other Brigadier users can see the explicit messages you type. Not even Roblox staff can see the messages; it's that hidden.

The Discord server is private, with over 5,500 premium users. Brigadier only costs US$15. Brigadier is included as part of Umbra; Roblox's smartest modding tool, currently in development.

projects.name: Brigadier Relay
platforms: Roblox and Visual Studio Code; for Windows and macOS
projects.description:
Brigadier Relay is a full-fledged script, plugin, and UI creation toolkit. Build your own clean, responsive, modern UIs without any prior experience and for completely free. Publish your scripts on our extensive cloud library for thousands of people to use. Integrate seamless payments using Apple Pay, PayPal, or Square.

Relay is the most feature-packed all-in-one license for developers.
  • Create scripts and plugins, and publish them for free to the cloud
  • Accept payments with Apple Pay, PayPal, and Square
  • Free access to our extensive developers' API and collection of libraries
  • Free access to Brigadier UI Library, the easiest way to create clean and modern interfaces for the twenty-first century
Brigadier Relay is whatever ya want it to be, baby. Coming in march ;)

projects.name: GBA Online (gba.js.org)
projects.headline: The best GameBoy Advance emulator.  (probably)
projects.description: GBA Online is a light-weight online emulator for the GameBoy Advance based on Iodine. It's hosted online at gba.js.org.

projects.name: Pokédex Online
projects.description: Pokédex Online is an online global Pokédex, dynamically generated using data grabbed from PokéApi.
